What We Do

Auto Repair
Services in
Dearborn, MI

Get a Free Estimate →
01
🛢️

Oil Change

Conventional, high-mileage, and full synthetic oil changes done fast — most customers are in and out in under 30 minutes. Quality oil and filters for every make and model.

Quick Service
02
🔧

Brake Service

Brake pads, rotors, shoes, calipers, and full brake system inspections. We only recommend what's actually needed — no unnecessary upsells, ever.

Safety First
03
🔩

Tire Sales & Repair

New tire sales, flat repairs, rotation, and balancing. We carry tires for all makes and models at competitive prices with same-day installation available.

Same-Day
04
⚙️

Wheel Alignment

Precision alignment using professional equipment. Proper alignment extends tire life, improves fuel efficiency, and keeps your vehicle tracking straight and safe on the road.

Precision Equipment
05
🔍

Engine Diagnostics

Check engine light on? Our diagnostic system pinpoints the exact issue. We give clear, honest explanations and upfront pricing — no guesswork, no surprises.

Check Engine Light
06
❄️

A/C & Cooling

A/C recharge, thermostat replacement, coolant flush, and radiator repair. Keep your cooling system healthy to prevent overheating and costly engine damage.

Year-Round Service

Why Dearborn Chooses Us

Built on
Trust &
Results

⚡

Fast Turnaround — Every Time

Most oil changes done in under 30 minutes. Brakes in a couple hours. We respect your time and don't make you wait when we don't have to.

🤝

Only Fix What Needs Fixing

We never upsell unnecessary services. Our customers consistently say we only recommend what's genuinely needed — and they keep coming back because of it.

💰

Honest Prices, No Surprises

Clear estimates before any work starts. Our prices beat most chain shops in the area — and you get better, more personal service every time.

🌍

Bilingual — English & Arabic

We proudly serve Dearborn's diverse community. Clear communication in both English and Arabic — no misunderstandings, just honest service for everyone.

Simple & Stress-Free

How It Works

1

Call or Book Online

Reach us by phone at (313) 563-1111 or use our booking form. Tell us what's going on and we'll get you scheduled fast.

2

Drop Off Your Car

Bring your vehicle to 22210 W Outer Drive. Our team greets you and gets straight to diagnosing the issue.

3

Clear Honest Estimate

We explain exactly what's needed and the cost before any work begins. No pressure, no surprises — just the facts.

4

Back on the Road

We get the job done efficiently. Most repairs are same-day. Your car leaves fixed right the first time.

The People You Can Count On

Meet
Our Team

Real expertise, real people — the faces behind Dearborn's highest-rated independent shop.

H

Hassan

Shop Manager & Lead Technician

Hassan is the heart of Dearborn Auto — named personally in dozens of 5-star reviews. Known across Dearborn for his honesty, fairness, and going above and beyond for every single customer. Fluent in English and Arabic.

S

Samer

Senior Automotive Technician

Samer brings deep hands-on expertise to every job. From complex engine diagnostics to precision brake work, his technical skills and attention to detail keep customers coming back and referring friends.

H

Huss

Tire & Quick Service Specialist

Huss is the quick-service expert on the team — praised by customers for fast, efficient, and clean oil changes and tire service. If speed without cutting corners matters to you, Huss delivers every time.
